programme.desc: An investigation into the 2002 murder of Jennifer Harris and the search for clues to what happened to her by a former Marine and a filmmaker who believe they can find the person responsible for the murder.

programme.title: Semi-Tough

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II

programme.title: The Heavenly Kid

programme.title: Teen Witch
programme.desc: One week before her sixteenth birthday, a girl realizes that she is the descendant from one of the witches of Salem. She uses her newfound powers to snag herself the football-hero as her boyfriend and to become the most popular girl in school.

programme.title: She-Devil

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure
programme.desc: Our non-heinous heroes Bill (Alex Winter) and Ted (Keanu Reeves) are in danger of flunking history! But when the righteous Rufus (George Carlin) arrives in a time-travelling phone booth, the dense dudes discover their destiny!

programme.desc: Dunglap hires Dog to eat his homework so he can truthfully use the excuse, “My Dog Ate My Homework.” While looking through Winslow's telescope, CatDog become convinced that a big, black cloud is foretelling the rain to end all rains.

programme.desc: CatDog find out that Cliff is taking ballet lessons. Randolph recruits CatDog for his “Freak-A-Palooza” circus.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: When a bratty preschooler tells Santa she wants CatDog for Christmas, Cat convinces Dog to accept so they can live in opulent splendor — which causes Santa to cancel Christmas!

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: A famished CatDog eats a ton of food at Rancid Rabbit's Rib Room, become incredibly obese, and can't afford the $34,000 bill. CatDog turn their house into a hotel, opening up their doors to, among others, a demanding Bavarian.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Shriek decides to quit the Greasers and fulfill her dreams of being a champion ice skater. Dog gets bonked on the head while chasing the garbage truck, giving him amnesia.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: While wandering through the State Fair, CatDog find themselves expertly riding a ferocious bucking bull. Dentist Rancid Rabbit finds out that whatever Dog eats affects Cat's teeth, and vice versa.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Competing in the Mayor's fitness test is going to be no picnic for Doug who is ironically out of shape. A hot-shot movie director is talent hunting in Bluffington and everyone is sure they will be chosen, especially Judy.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: The Beets concert is sold out, but Doug finagles two tickets out of his sister. He and Skeeter set out on an incredible adventure where they end up as emergency Beets roadies. Doug has a cavity and must go to the dentist.

programme.title: Doug

programme.title: Doug

programme.title: Doug

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug and Skeeter decide to work together to create their own comic book. Roger and his pet Stinky challenge Doug and Porkchop to enter the Bluffington pet talent show.

programme.title: Doug

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug was looking forward to Beebe's party, until something shows up that makes it impossible for him to go out in public. Phil Funnie convinces Doug that he has a great idea for a kite to compete in the upcoming Bluffscout airshow.

programme.title: Doug

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Mrs. Wingo has a substitute and Doug somehow makes a bad first impression. Patti's pulverizers are winning games but all of the parents, including Doug's dad, want their kid to pitch.

programme.desc: Love and Cheese: Arnold goes all out to win Lila's affection by taking her to the Annual Cheese Festival. Weighing Harold: Harold feels that he has gotten too fat, so he gets his parents to send him on a weight-off cruise.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: It Girl/Deconstructing Arnold

programme.desc: Grudge Match: Arnold and Grandpa vs Helga and Big Bob in a fender bender blame game. Polishing Rhonda: Rhonda and Patty's rivalry heats up at finishing school.

programme.desc: Kendall and Logan volunteer at a dog shelter and end up adopting 12 dogs, but a sneaky heath inspector is on to them. Carlos and Jennifer’s puppy love is sickening and it’s up to James and the other Jennifers to rescue them.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All

programme.desc: Eric leaves Kenan and Kel in charge of his girlfriend, who has come to visit when mayhem breaks loose as bad things keep happening to her.

programme.desc: Kenan makes it a mission to get his driver's license, a mission which requires the borrowing of Marc Cram's car for the test.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El pecado de los padres
programme.desc: Frank busca pruebas contra un sospechoso de matar a un policía que disparó a un compañero de Henry hace años. Danny y Baez investigan una serie de asesinatos relacionados con estrellas de cine para adultos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Equipaje
programme.desc: Danny se siente desconcertado cuando descubre que un grupo de veteranos del ejército altamente entrenados son responsables de un robo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Hogar dulce hogar
programme.desc: Jamie involucra a Danny cuando encuentra a un adolescente sin hogar que afirma que su tía fue asesinada por su novio. Mientras tanto, Erin se enfurece cuando McCoy la reemplaza como fiscal en un caso que involucra a un guardia de prisión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Historias de amor
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan cuando un propietario dispara a un intruso, solo para descubrir que el intruso es un sicario. Además, un joven abogado intenta hacer justicia para su madre, a quien Erin envió a prisión por un cargo de asesinato hace 12 años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamado a Kansas para investigar una serie de asesinatos, una reunión tensa comienza entre Blake y su padre, un capitán de policía retirado, y su hermano, un detective, y deben trabajar juntos para ayudar a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC va a San José para investigar una serie de asesinatos, García profundiza en su pasado hacker y se reencuentra con su antiguo amor para ayudar al equipo con el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras que el UAC busca un asesino múltiple suelto en Cleveland, Rossi se preocupa cuando un antiguo sargento de la Marina se pierde y se dirige a Los Ángeles para encontrarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fin del juego
programme.desc: Con la ayuda del equipo, Vance se enfrenta a sus demonios mientras descubre una compleja relación con un asesino que pone en peligro a toda su familia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Apagón
programme.desc: El equipo se encuentra literalmente a oscuras cuando la investigación sobre la muerte de un teniente se relaciona con un apagón en toda la ciudad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Juego de niños
programme.desc: El trabajo diurno de un marine muerto en un laboratorio de ideas del gobierno lleva a Gibbs y al equipo a la vida de un niño prodigio de 12 años que puede ser el próximo objetivo del asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fe
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo alistado de un coronel retirado convertido en predicador aparece muerto, el equipo cree que puede ser víctima de un crimen de odio. Mientras tanto, el padre de Gibbs viene de visita por vacaciones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Historias de amor
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan cuando un propietario dispara a un intruso, solo para descubrir que el intruso es un sicario. Además, un joven abogado intenta hacer justicia para su madre, a quien Erin envió a prisión por un cargo de asesinato hace 12 años.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La puerta de los pobres
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un residente de bajos ingresos en un edificio de lujo con unidades asequibles. Frank se enfrenta a un problema con un detective amigo de Gormley que abusa de su posición.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The threat of a tasing is enough to slow a fleeing suspect, a heated argument between girlfriends leads to vehicular assault, and a man with weed in his car has no poker face.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrested man has a long list of instructions for his "bae," and a driver charged with heroin possession claims he was framed by the passenger in his backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer finds a woman asleep at the wheel in the middle of a highway, deputies investigate a possible kidnapping, and a nervous driver just wants to be honest with police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.desc: The CSIs track a cannibalistic killer and discover he's not alone.

programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the cyber-related murder of a prominent casino owner's wife and receive help from the FBI's Cyber Crime Division.

programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a present-day crime with ties to a mob heist that occurred 25 years ago. Meanwhile, Brass has a decision to make when his daughter attempts suicide.

programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a robbery and fatal shooting at a medical marijuana shop.

programme.desc: The CSI team suspects foul play when a chemistry teacher's science experiment goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: El bebé de Bridget Jones

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Al borde de la razón
programme.desc: Después de seis semanas perfectas con su novio Mark Darcy, el pícaro Daniel Cleaver vuelve, afirmando ser un hombre reformado. ¿Encontrará Bridget una forma de hacer que el amor perdure para siempre?

programme.title: Novia a la fuga
programme.desc: Roberts y Gere confirman su condición de eterno equipo de pantalla en esta encantadora comedia romántica llena de risas.

programme.title: El diario de Bridget Jones
programme.desc: La soltera Bridget Jones decide cambiar su vida y escribir sus pensamientos, opiniones e inseguridades en un diario. El resultado es una divertida crónica de sus aventuras en este clásico de la modernidad romántica.

programme.title: El bebé de Bridget Jones
programme.desc: Regresa Bridget Jones inesperadamente embarazada y sin saber la identidad del padre del bebé. Los ganadores del Óscar Renée Zellweger y Colin Firth se unen a Patrick Dempsey en el siguiente capítulo de la vida divertida y sorpresiva de Bridget.

programme.title: El proceso de las señoritas Vivanco
programme.desc: Teresita insiste en acompañar a Hortensia en la cárcel. Ella se las ingeniará para que la metan presa. El director del penal pone a las Vivanco al abrigo de las burlas de las demás presas y de la dureza de los carceleros.

programme.title: Las Señoritas Vivanco
programme.desc: Dos hermanas solteronas creen que cometer un robo deja de ser considerado como pecado luego de ir a la confesión.

programme.title: El Quijote
programme.desc: Don Quijote decide ayudar a Dorotea a recuperar su reino y luchar contra los odres, creyendo que son gigantes. La Santa Hermandad apresa a don Quijote y, con la complicidad del cura y el barbero, lo envían internado a su pueblo.

programme.title: Acá las tortas (Los hijos de los ricos)
programme.desc: Don Chente y Dolores son un matrimonio que dirige una modesta pero exitosa tortería. Cuando sus hijos regresan tras terminar sus estudios en el extranjero, deberán lidiar con sus refinados gustos y constantes solicitudes económicas.

programme.title: Dos pesos dejada
programme.desc: Fermín, un taxista vividor, se enamora de la hija de una comerciante adinerada, pero sus intenciones de conquistarla pronto se vuelven obsesivas y pierden el rumbo, llevándolo a consecuencias inminentes y peligrosas.

programme.title: El proceso de las señoritas Vivanco
programme.desc: Teresita insiste en acompañar a Hortensia en la cárcel. Ella se las ingeniará para que la metan presa. El director del penal pone a las Vivanco al abrigo de las burlas de las demás presas y de la dureza de los carceleros.

programme.title: Las Señoritas Vivanco
programme.desc: Dos hermanas solteronas creen que cometer un robo deja de ser considerado como pecado luego de ir a la confesión.

programme.title: El caso Thomas Crown
programme.desc: Thomas Crown (McQueen), un millonario de Boston, un hombre que se ha hecho a sí mismo, se aburre de la vida que lleva. Para huir de la rutina, prepara un golpe perfecto: robar un banco y marcharse después a Brasil.

programme.title: Los intocables
programme.desc: El clásico enfrentamiento entre el bien y el mal, con Kevin Costner como el agente federal Eliot Ness, Robert De Niro como el jefe mafioso Al Capone y Sean Connery como Malone.

programme.title: Estallido mortal
programme.desc: Mientras graba sonidos en exteriores, un técnico de efectos sonoros (John Travolta) captura el mortal accidente de un candidato a la presidencia. Pero, ¿el sonido que oyó fue el estallido de un neumático o el disparo de un asesino?

programme.title: Bandidos
programme.desc: ¡Prepárate para una comedia de acción de lo más divertida con Bruce Willis, Billy Bob Thornton y Cate Blanchett! Joe (Willis) y Terry (Thornton), dos convictos, arman un plan para robar un banco… hasta que se topan con una ama de casa bastante excéntrica.

programme.title: Lila & Eve
programme.desc: Dos madres angustiadas, cuyos hijos murieron por disparos en un automóvil en movimiento, se unen para vengar sus muertes después de que las autoridades locales no tomen medidas.

programme.title: Atracción fatal
programme.desc: Michael Douglas interpreta a Dan, un abogado neoyorquino quien tiene un encuentro amoroso con la seductora Alex Forrest cuando su esposa no está. Dan luego termina el amorío por considerarlo un error, pero Alex no quiere ser ignorada...

programme.title: Los intocables
programme.desc: El clásico enfrentamiento entre el bien y el mal, con Kevin Costner como el agente federal Eliot Ness, Robert De Niro como el jefe mafioso Al Capone y Sean Connery como Malone.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Corazón valiente, la detallada y feroz saga de combate, amor tierno y la voluntad de arriesgarlo todo por la libertad. Película de Mel Gibson, ganadora del Premio de la Academia®. En una actuación cargada de emociones.

programme.title: Rescatando al soldado Ryan
programme.desc: ¿Por qué están ocho hombres arriesgando sus vidas para salvar solo una? Rodeados de las brutales realidades de la guerra, cada hombre busca su propia respuesta, y la fuerza para triunfar sobre un futuro incierto con honor, decencia y valentía.

programme.title: Camino a la perdición
programme.desc: Lazos de lealtad son puestos a prueba cuando el hijo de un sicario descubre cómo su padre se gana la vida.

programme.title: Descubriendo el país de nunca jamás
programme.desc: Fantasía y realidad confluyen en este éxito memorable que explora los orígenes de una de las fábulas más maravillosas de todos los tiempos: Peter Pan. Nominada a siete Premios Óscar, incluida la mejor película.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky
programme.desc: Joven y próspero, David puede tener todo lo que desee su corazón. Pero su vida parece estar incompleta. Una noche, David conoce a la mujer de sus sueños y cree que puede haber encontrado la pieza que le faltaba.

programme.title: 13 horas: los soldados secretos de Bengasi
programme.desc: Del director Michael Bay, 13 horas es la historia de un grupo élite de seis ex-militares asignados para proteger a la CIA, que lucharon cuando los terroristas atacaron un complejo diplomático estadounidense el 11 de septiembre de 2012.

programme.title: Elefante blanco
programme.desc: Un asesino es contratado por un hombre de negocios para vengar el asesinato de su hija por parte de traficantes de esclavos blancos en Tailandia.

programme.title: El Último Cuerpo
programme.desc: El asesinato de un travesti despierta en el periodista Heriberto Camargo una sed de verdad. En su investigación, descubre que no de un delito aislado. Es parte de una serie de asesinatos brutales de agentes de policía.

programme.title: Aguas profundas
programme.desc: Kate (Halle Berry) acepta la lucrativa oportunidad de guiar a un empresario millonario en busca de emociones, por medio del buceo con tiburones en las más peligrosas aguas... fuera de la jaula.

programme.title: Los últimos caballeros
programme.desc: Clive Owen protagoniza esta épica aventura del arte de pelear con espadas, un guerrero caído que lucha para vengar a su deshonrado maestro (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Pisando fuerte
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: Mundo futuro
programme.desc: Un parque de atracciones del futuro satisface las fantasías de cualquier adulto. Unos androides muy realistas complacen todo tipo de caprichos. Divertido, ¿verdad? No tanto, como descubren un reportero y su secretaria durante una fiesta para la prensa…

programme.title: La invención de Hugo Cabret
programme.desc: Situada en París en 1930, un huérfano que vive entre los muros de una estación de trenes, se encuentra envuelto en un misterioso suceso que involucra a su padre y a un autómata.

programme.title: Superagente Cody Banks
programme.desc: Frankie Muniz encarna a un agente juvenil de la CIA en esta mezcla de comedia y acción. Cody Banks es elegido para impedir el complot de un villano que busca apoderarse del mundo. ¡Pero primero, él debe superar su timidez hacia las chicas!

programme.title: Cody Banks: destino Londres
programme.desc: En Inglaterra, Cody Banks se hace pasar por un prodigio de la música para frustrar los planes de un agente malvado que quiere dominar el mundo con un dispositivo controlador de mentes.

programme.title: La máquina del tiempo
programme.desc: Con la esperanza de alterar los acontecimientos del pasado, un inventor del siglo XIX viaja 800 000 años hacia el futuro, donde encuentra a la humanidad dividida en dos razas beligerantes.

programme.title: El hombre de la máscara de hierro
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio lidera un elenco fenomenal en esta emocionante historia de majestad y mosqueteros. Cuando el arrogante rey Luis XIV de Francia comienzan a amenazar la vida de sus súbditos, ¡los legendarios mosqueteros se reúnen para salvar su país!

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: Lo que ellas quieren
programme.desc: Nick Marshall (Mel Gibson), un ejecutivo publicitario y soltero promiscuo, obtiene accidentalmente el poder de oír lo que piensan las mujeres. Nick decide usar su nuevo poder para sabotear a su jefa, Darcy (Helen Hunt), y avanzar en su propia carrera.

programme.title: Los reyes pal palacio
programme.desc: Momentos divertidos al lado de los talentosos Miguel Céspedes y Raymond Pozo, con más de 600 programas de televisión producidos y viendo la sonrisa de la gente de manera directa en los espectáculos que han realizado en vivo.

programme.title: El nombre del juego
programme.desc: Chili Palmer, un gángster de Miami, viaja a Los Ángeles para cobrar una deuda a un productor. Pero una vez allí, entra de lleno en el mundo del cine. Todo sería perfecto si no fuera por el acoso de unos estafadores locales y un gángster de su pasado.

programme.title: Tómalo con calma
programme.desc: John Travolta regresa como Chili Palmer en esta película, así que "Tómalo con calma". Con un reparto lleno de estrellas como Uma Thurman y The Rock, esta película cuenta la cómica historia de un mafioso que quiere ser un gigante de la música.

programme.title: Una película de miedo
programme.desc: En esta divertida parodia de una película de terror, un grupo de adolescentes son acosados por un psicópata enmascarado. Protagonizada por Carmen Electra, Marlon Wayans, Jon Abrahams, Shannon Elizabeth, Shawn Wayans, y Anna Faris.

programme.title: Scary movie 2: Otra película de miedo
programme.desc: ¡Alguien llevó demasiado lejos a tu amor por las secuelas! Regresan los personajes cómicos favoritos de 'Scary Movie', con mayor diversión e irreverente de la película original.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Cómo cortar a tu patán
programme.desc: Amanda, una terapeuta especializada en ayudar a las mujeres a terminar las relaciones destructivas, vive lejos de los hombres y del compromiso. Dedicada al trabajo y la protección de su hermana Natalia.

programme.title: Las horas contigo
programme.desc: Eva debe aprender a lidiar con un embarazo no deseado frente a la muerte inminente de su amada abuela y arreglar su relación con su madre separada.

programme.title: Whisky
programme.desc: Una comedia inspirada y hermosamente trágica sobre Jacobo, el dueño de sesenta años de una pequeña y anticuada fábrica de calcetines, es iluminado con detalle inexpresivo, repetitivo y monótono. Subtitulada.

programme.title: Todo Incluido
programme.desc: Una familia de vacaciones se ve obligada a esconderse en su habitación de hotel cuando un huracán arrasa el centro turístico, donde pronto empiezan a revelarse verdades que han permanecido ocultas durante mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: Cuando su amigo hacker accidentalmente canaliza una misteriosa señal inalámbrica, un grupo de estudiantes se reúnen para detener a un terrible mal que se apodera del mundo.

programme.title: La piel fría
programme.desc: Un joven llega a una isla remota para ocupar un puesto de observador meteorológico y luego se encuentra defendiendo la torre de vigilancia, contra las criaturas mortales que viven en la costa de la isla.

programme.title: 666: El niño Diablo
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita desde el cielo hasta la Tierra. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adopte pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: Culto de Amityville
programme.desc: Después de heredar inesperada y misteriosamente la mansión de su abuela, Stanley DeFeo se encuentra en la pequeña ciudad de Amityville, rodeado de secretos familiares enterrados y un complot siniestro en su contra.

programme.title: La maldición de las hermanas
programme.desc: De los productores de El Aro y Paranoia llega esta escalofriante película, LA MALDICIÓN DE LAS HERMANAS (THE UNINVITED).

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: Scream. Grita antes de morir
programme.desc: Luego de una serie de muertes misteriosas, un grupo de fanáticos de películas de terror se vuelven el blanco de un asesino enmascarado en este thriller exitoso del director Wes Craven, que reinventó el género del terror.

programme.title: Scream 2
programme.desc: En la universidad, Sidney Prescott creyó que al fin había dejado atrás el terror... hasta que un asesino imitador empieza a interpretar una secuela real donde nadie está a salvo ni libre de sospecha.

programme.title: Comes a Horseman
programme.desc: Set in the American West of the 1940s, a pair of little-guy ranchers join forces against the depredations of a ruthless land baron determined to expand his empire at whatever cost. Starring Jane Fonda, James Caan, and Jason Robards.

programme.title: Night Stage To Galveston
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Pat Buttram work for a newspaper publisher, and find evidence of corruption in the Texas State Police. The publisher’s daughter is kidnapped to prevent the story from being published.

programme.title: John Wayne: Cold Vengeance
programme.desc: When his father is gunned down by bandits, John Mason (Wayne) hatches a plot to catch the killer. In Vibrant Color!

programme.title: Buffalo Bill And The Indians
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill has fought Indians & Civil War battles, but nothing can prepare him for show business! When he signs Sitting Bull for a role in his Wild West Show, the clash of cultures reverberates far beyond the boundaries of their sprawling theater.

programme.title: Fort Yuma
programme.desc: When a revered Apache chief is brutally murdered en route to Fort Yuma to negotiate a peace treaty, all-out war erupts in this rousing -- and surprisingly touching -- western starring Peter Graves and directed by the legendary Lesley Selander.

programme.title: John Sturges' The Hallelujah Trail
programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: The Hitch-Hiker
programme.desc: Two fishermen pick up a psychotic escaped convict who tells them that he intends to murder them when the ride is over.

programme.title: The Seven Year Itch
programme.desc: With his family away for their annual summer holiday, New Yorker Richard Sherman (Tom Ewell) decides he has the opportunity to live a bachelor's life. The beautiful but ditsy blond (Marilyn Monroe) from the apartment above his catches his eye.

programme.title: How to Succeed in Business Without Really Trying (1967)
programme.desc: This hilarious musical stars Robert Morse as a charming and scheming window washer who climbs to the top of the corporate ladder by way of a self-help book.

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Steve McQueen, James Garner, and Richard Attenborough headline a stellar cast in one of the most ingenious and suspenseful adventure films of all time as a team of Allied soldiers mount a daring escape from an inescapable Nazi POW camp.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: A cave collapse traps a man, and all eyes turn toward the tragedy, including those of Charles "Chuck" Tatum (Kirk Douglas), a washed-up newspaper reporter who sees the incident as a ticket back to his former days at the top of the journalism heap.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: This hysterical comedy from director Billy Wilder finds Tony Curtis and Jack Lemmon masquerading as women in order to elude irate Chicago mobsters while befriending a beautiful singer (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike is all stressed out with upcoming exams leaving him impotent and frustrated. Gloria encourages him to discuss it with her, but he refuses. Gloria confides in Edith what the problem is, and in turn she tells Archie.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The Bunkers are having problems with their furnace which gets Archie entertaining the idea of moving. When an unscrupulous black real-estate salesman, Mr. Byrd, offers Archie a hefty sum of money for his home, Archie is all for it despite Mike's warnings.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie comes home from work in a particularly awful mood because he has to make an important decision at work. His decision to lay off a Puerto Rican leads to an interesting visit to the Bunker household.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: It looks like Christmas at the Findlay's will be limited to a broken vase and a pair of old socks, until Arthur offers Walter a golden opportunity.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude begins to lose control of her efforts to raise money for a mental health clinic when her hero-worshipping cousin pays a surprising visit.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude storms out of her house and into a romantic little restaurant after Walter forbids her to have lunch with a handsome newly divorced 'friend.'

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Arthur performs an operation he will remember all his life, when his famous practical-joking college roommate becomes more than just another patient.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter's out of town and Maude's life is threatened by an oversexed housepainter. With Arthur on night duty at the hospital, Maude and Vivian barricade themselves in the house and drink a little wine to ward off the cold. and a severe case of hysteria.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is ecstatic over the prospect of seeing a close friend at their college class reunion, but when her friend arrives in a wheelchair, Maude heads straight for the punchbowl.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: When Oscar Madison finds a friend with inside information on his favorite sport, horse racing, he begins to win every bet.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix Unger is irate when given notice of another rent increase and organizes the entire building to go on strike until certain repairs and improvements are made to either justify the increase or cancel it altogether.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: A pro hockey player hits Oscar and Felix, trying to patch things up, winds up challenging the athlete to a boxing match.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar become roommates in the hospital in Hospital Mates.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Lonesome George Gobel is in town for a benefit and escapes to the Douglas household for some "quiet" time.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie is overwhelmed when his mechanic friend "Pig" puts on a dress and perfume and becomes the lovely Peggy.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: The boys want a raise in their allowance, but Steve tells them that they are spending money recklessly and not doing their chores.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: While working on a Social Studies project on teenage marriages for school, Mike (Tim Considine) and his girlfriend Jean (Cynthia Pepper) have everyone convinced that they've eloped.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob's paternal pride suffers a cruel shock when he finds out that his six-year-old son is embarrassed to admit how his Dad makes a living.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Sally drags the entire gang to a bowling alley when she discovers a new dance sensation that's sure to sweep the nation.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura believes Rob, on jury duty, has been unfairly swayed by the beautiful blonde defendant.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Romance enters Sally's life in the form of an insurance salesman named Leo Fassbinder.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Plans for the annual Hotterville Founders' Day celebration are wrecked by generation-gap dissension.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe leads a delegation out to Washington, D.C., to save Sam Ducker's post office.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett and his Five-O crew discover that a fishing boat owner is smuggling gold bars into the islands. Johnny Fargo, owner of the tuna boat, and his brilliant but cynical attorney lead the Five-O unit on a fast chase through downtown Honolulu.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett has himself committed to a California prison in order to obtain information linking the disappearance of a priceless jewel collection to the mysterious death of a beautiful girl.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Joey Rand, a young singer, turns to crime when he finds his singing career provides insufficient funds to pay his gambling debts.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, Kathryn Bishop de 82 años es encontrada muerta en su hogar de Pennsylvania. Pequeñas pistas en el cuerpo de la víctima le dirán a la policía lo que pasó esa noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, Cassie Hansen, de 6 años, desapareció de su iglesia de Minnesota durante una misa vespertina. Después de recibir un aviso de que se vio a un hombre mayor cargando a una persona pequeña, la policía encontró el cuerpo de Cassie en un basurero.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2001, Ginger Hayes y su pequeño hijo fueron secuestrados durante un robo de auto. El crimen había sido reportado por un testigo a los pocos minutos de ocurrir.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love For New York?
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony – they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash-talking until Chamo delivers a New York Note.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining 5 guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: I Love New York: Gettin' Hot In The Desert
programme.desc: New York wants to get to know the guys better so she takes them on 2 separate overnight double dates to Palm Springs. At the end of each night, she chooses one special guy to join her in her room for a nightcap.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma's Boys
programme.desc: All 3 guys have met New York's mom, now it's her turn to meet theirs. The guys and their moms do their best to impress NY and Sister Patterson but they are tough ladies.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Final Adios
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final 2 men to pack their bags because they're goin' to Playa Car, Mexico for an exotic getaway!

programme.title: I Love New York: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: New York must eliminate 5 men, but it's not that easy. At a pre-elimination cocktail party, things heat up as the men drink too much, fight and even bribe others to win over New York.

programme.title: I Love New York: Flowers from Fishburne
programme.desc: Now down to 15 men, New York invites the guys to a pond where they must prove their love by swimming to her and presenting her with a gift.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is terrified that Vince will come for him and he’s unable to function normally. He pushes away Bianca and when she tries to make it right, she only causes Drew more pain.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Dave and Adam want to co-host an in-school radio show. Dave has concerns because Adam is transgender. When Dave voices his discomfort over the airwaves, the school turns against him.

programme.desc: Spike and Shane's parents finally meet and all agree adoption is best for Spike's baby. Shane, however, has his own ideas. Meanwhile, Melanie breaks a date with Yick to go out with Snake, but her deception is discovered.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed as an epileptic, Caitlin is having a hard time accepting her condition. She convinces her mother to let her audition for the school play, but then nearly drops out - blaming her disease - when she doesn't get the part.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When, in response to Joey's ridicule, Dwayne challenges him to a fight, Joey feels he has to go through with it. Meanwhile, Stephanie finally realizes, after weeks of flirtation, that Simon is interested in Alexa, not her.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When the Degrassi Jr. High quiz team goes to Kathleen's house to prepare for a match, they discover that Kathleen's mother is an alcoholic. Rich and Caitlin offer Kathleen their support.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Sick of being confused with her twin sister Heather, Erica is determined to define herself as an individual. She finds an opportunity at the Spring Dance, where she is found passionately kissing a strange boy!

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: As Stephanie's mother makes plans to remarry and her father continues to fight for custody of her and her brother, Stephanie becomes increasingly despondent. She even starts to talk about suicide.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: A group of parents demands that Spike be moved to another school because her pregnancy sets a bad example. Some of the students agree, but Caitlin writes an article for the school newspaper supporting Spike.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When the school board votes to expel Spike from Degrassi, the students wonder why Spike is being kicked out. Meanwhile, disaster strikes when Joey and Wheels talk Snake into letting them spend the night when his parents are away.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how ancient civilisations learned to exploit the water around them, from the flooding of our Stone Age ancestors' hunting grounds to the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how salt has played a crucial role in the history of the Mediterranean, from the ice ages to the preservation of food and dead bodies in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Body in the Bog
programme.desc: Veteran archaeologist Ned Kelly and a team of scientists investigate the find of a mummified body in the boglands of Cashel, Ireland.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: A journey to discover the legendary lost city of Piramesse, a magnificent ancient capital built 3,000 years ago by the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses the Great.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Exipdexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's feeling lucky, so he's going to try to capture two women in one day. The first, Moani, has "crazy" tattooed on her neck and is facing drug charges. The second fugitive, Jade, who turns out to be a tough catch, despite help from Jade's sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has problems when he goes to a small town on the Big Island of Hawaii to track down a fugitive. In a small town, everyone knows everyone else's business, making it impossible for Dog to hunt in secret.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is trying to cut down on smoking, but it's not easy with his high-stress job. Today, he must track down Walter, a fugitive who believes that the Canadian military has planted a chip in his teeth that allows him to communicate with his van.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth designs a luxurious new office for the team and shows it off to Dog, but the bounty hunter is more interested in starting his hunt for Federico, who's been revoked for missing court dates and generally running amuck.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes on his a case, which involves Bobby, who's been on parole for three months pending sentencing on an assault charge. Bobby's girlfriend wants him back in jail, and Dog agrees that the Bobby needs to be behind bars.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been ruined by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home and loving family for an ice pipe. The next case involves Jude. His addiction has caused his pregnant wife to fear for her safety.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Lilybuds

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: The lovebirds of the A-List experience some fireworks of a different kind. While Reichen tries to focus on other sources of income, Rodiney makes a shocking discovery on Reichen's phone.

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: The boys of the A-List get physical. When they try to plan a trip to Maine with Reichen, he receives an unexpected visit that thwarts their plans. Meanwhile, Austin's friendship with Reichen deepens but becomes strained when he opens up to him.

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: Reichen faces resistance from the boys when he wants to bring Rodiney to Maine. And with Austin in the mix, his troubles amp up even more.

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: The drama continues on the A-List.

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: The cast of The A-List: New York is reunited to discuss the drama of the first season.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: Ten All Stars compete for $100,000 and a place in the Drag Race Hall of Fame! Their first challenge is a salute to LGBTQ troops in an All Star-Spangled Variety Show!

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The All Stars audition for a new supergroup, 'Henny!' and must write lyrics and perform epic choreographed numbers, featuring Drag Race legend, Stacy Layne Matthews. Extra special guest judges Kacey Musgraves and Ciara.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The All Stars compete in The Snatch Game, but with a romantic twist! The Super Queens impersonate celebrities to win the hearts of hunky bachelors. Extra special guest judges: Olympian Gus Kenworthy and Keiynan Lonsdale ('Love Simon').

programme.title: No Witness, No Protection
programme.desc: There's trouble in paradise for besties Sierra and Karlie. Up and coming rap superstar LightSkinKeisha is on the scene with her man by her side. Karlie and Alexis bond over a shared enemy and Scrappy continues to fear for Momma Dee's life.

programme.title: Oh Deer
programme.desc: Former besties Karlie and Sierra are left reeling after their brawl. Bambi has it out for alleged homewrecker LightSkinKeisha. Stevie uncovers Mimi's deep seated abandonment issues. And Scrappy worries Momma Dee is drinking again.

programme.title: Queen of Atlanta
programme.desc: Akbar goes to war with LightSkinKeisha over her throne as queen of Atlanta. Scrappy and Bambi seek peace for their family, but their moms have other plans in mind. Newbie Kiyomi Leslie is on the scene. And Shooter juggles his messy love life.

programme.title: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: Rasheeda decides to whisk the girls away for a ski trip, but a family crisis gets in the way. Sierra and Shooter are also in crisis when their daughter is assaulted at school. Alexis opens up about her traumatic past. And a family feud turns nasty.

programme.title: You Trippin'
programme.desc: The ski trip gets off to a dramatic start as the ladies take pregnancy tests. Spice and Shekinah butt heads. All hell breaks loose as Shooter's messy love triangle implodes. Newlyweds Safaree and Erica witness Cheyenne and Ki'yomi coming face to face.

programme.title: Black Diamond
programme.desc: Karlie and Sierra have an emotional heart to heart on the ski trip. Shekinah and Spice's feud rages on. Shooter's messy love triangle goes up in flames after Cheyenne and Ki'yomi come face to face. Sierra catches BK cheating.

programme.title: The Kids Are Alright
programme.desc: Bambi breaks the news to Scrappy about baby number two, leaving Momma Dee feeling left out of the palace. Kirk and Rasheeda pick up the pieces when Kirk Jr is released from prison. And a vengeful BK turns the cheating rumors back on Sierra.

programme.title: Shut It Down
programme.desc: Coronavirus cases in Atlanta explode leaving everyone wondering how they'll make ends meet. All hell breaks loose when Akbar comes face to face with her many enemies at Spice's pop up shop.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Rasheeda and Kirk's children interrupt their alone time. Sierra finds closure with BK. Yandy and Mendeecees balance work and family after their move to Atlanta. Yung Baby Tate makes major industry moves, and Erica's marriage blows up in the blogs.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Rasheeda and Kirk lay down the law with their kids to save their family's financial future. Omeretta The Great faces the music over a diss track she wrote about her mother. Erica gets unexpected news about her future with Safaree.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Yandy struggles to move forward with her foster daughter, Infinity. Yung Baby Tate mixes business and pleasure in Los Angeles. Karlie Redd finds new love, and Erica Mena reveals life changing news to Safaree.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: A surprise visit from Yandy's foster daughter, Infinity, leaves Yandy and Mendeecees on guard. Tate airs out her issues with Guapdad 4000. Rasheeda confronts her estranged older sister, and Erica Mena reveals the gender of her baby.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: The passing of legendary rapper DMX sends Kirk and Safaree to New York to pay homage to the rap superstar. Renni Rucci balances a budding music career and life as a single mom. Omeretta The Great attempts to find common ground with her mother.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Karlie opens up to her daughter, Jasmine, about her tumultuous past. Erica and Safaree work toward resolution. Rasheeda confronts her sister. Yandy doesn't feel at home in her own house, leading her and Mendeecees to tell Infinity it's time to move out.

programme.title: The Invisible River: Under Water Between the Black Forest and the Vosges
programme.desc: Between the Black Forest and the Vosges it's not only the Rhine that flows slowly northwards but also another waterway that is hidden from view.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: Experience the wonders of animal life in the Galapagos, where volcanoes, ocean currents and isolation shape existence; dive into mangrove forests, meet bold boobies and flightless cormorants; see Darwin's theory of evolution in action.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Exploring the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean's most peculiar creatures; learning how bloody battles for mates, gender bending, and super-size litters of babies might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: Animal scavengers and poachers have their own special abilities; true burglars know how to move stealthily and unnoticed, never give up, be agile, always have the right tools and, in addition, travel lightly and quickly.

programme.title: Hot life in Africa
programme.desc: Study the life-saving cooling techniques cheetahs, crocs, and giraffes use.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: Observe the islands' natural rhythms and the challenges of bringing forth new life in this wild outpost; watch as turtles return to their nesting sites, rival iguanas butt heads to win a new mate, and albatrosses conduct sweet courtship dances.

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: On the first day of spring in Australia, creatures look for either dinner or a date, ranging from kangaroos in the grasslands to koalas in the trees and freshwater crocodiles.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Meeting alphas who get by with a little help from their friends; the inescapable gang mentality of mating male dolphins; ant colonies' unique scents; female geladas always get the last word; wolves hunt family-style.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Celebrating small but mighty animal warriors armed with sheaves of scary weapons; admiring nutrias' stink bombs; honey badgers' needlelike choppers; black-tailed gulls' razor-sharp beaks; the killer talons on dive-bombing peregrine falcons.

programme.title: World's Deadliest
programme.desc: Aquatic and terrestrial creatures engage in combat as they dispute borders between land and water; predators learn to hunt in different situations while prey must watch for attacks.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Wildebeest battle for herd hierarchy, meerkats live the thug life, floppy fish fight it out on land and locusts give up their vegetarian ways in a frenzy of cannibalism; it all happens on the wild and wide-open landscape of South Africa.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: The latitudes south of the Sahara offer vastly different battlegrounds for a wide range of warriors; male giraffes swing their heads like wrecking balls, zebras boast the most powerful kick in the animal kingdom, and chimpanzee warfare is familiar.

programme.title: World's Biggest and Baddest Bugs
programme.desc: Get a close-up on creepy-crawlies with a entomologsit.

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: Nature's butchers, living on the wildest side of life, feeding on blood, bone and guts; This eclectic group of creatures is endowed with the ability not only to hunt their victims but even to disembowel them.

programme.title: Ghost Killers
programme.desc: As nocturnal birds of prey, owls count on legendary hunting senses; their ability to hear, see, and fly in the dark makes them exceptional predators with a crucial ecological importance.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: The blonde manes of golden snub-nose monkeys; pink flamingo feathers brought on by an all-crustacean diet; the markings of gemsboks and cheetahs.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Built with the pioneering use of steel-wire support cables, the Brooklyn Bridge became an instant symbol of American pride; rare photographs and behind-the-scenes stories recall the politics, the struggles, and the tragedies that made it possible.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: More than 50 years after its construction, the Golden Gate remains one of the world's great engineering marvels. It took 25-million man-hours and 80,000 miles of cable to complete; the cost in human life proved even greater.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A large factory-fishing boat hunts down, catches and processes 300 tons of Alaskan pollock each day in the Bering Sea; the crew reveals the inner workings of one of the most sophisticated and complex vessels afloat.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Operating in space's harsh environment, these technological marvels serve as the world's most precious cargo; a journey from a British sci-fi writer's futuristic visions to a German rocket designer's wartime creations.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Considered by many to be the most astounding machine ever built, this reusable spaceship is the apex of flight technology; the challenges and the critical issues that led to NASA's decision to create an "airplane" to navigate space.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Every aspect of live involves pressure; it's what puts the bubbles in soft drinks, propels shaving cream from its can, cools the contents of your refrigerator, and causes volcanoes to erupt; but rapid pressure changes can be as violent as explosions.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The story of tuna, the most popular fish in the American diet; fishing and canning operations; a single tuna can net as much as $100,000 in the world's largest fish market in Tokyo; efforts to save the giant bluefin tuna tuna from overfishing.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Shoes have come a long way from their humble beginnings as simple leather moccasins; Nowaday footwear is built to withstand any extreme environment where a foot can tread, from the heart of a burning building to the track of an Olympic stadium.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A pilot who builds his own jet-powered glider; canoe makers in Montana; a knife maker in Washington; craftsmen keep alive the ancient art of weapon making; Skulls International in Oklahoma City; handmade special effects.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: From a massive oil spill to refinery blaze to a downed plane, find out what went wrong and how to prevent the next engineering disaster.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Pop open the hood, check out the carbs, and hear the engines roar as we journey back to a time when gas was cheap, emission controls non-existent, and all that mattered was acceleration and speed.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Cape Cod Canal represents an engineering feat many believed impossible; begun in 1909 during the Great Depression, this major commerce and recreational Intracoastal Waterway route showcases determination, ingenuity, and American spirit.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: San Francisco's Oakland Bay Bridge features a unique double suspension.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The construction of the 51-mile canal that took ten years to build and employed over 40,000 workers, 6,000 of whom died of yellow fever, malaria, and other horrors; an earlier, nine-year attempt by the French ended in failure and cost 20,000 lives.

programme.desc: Después de ver una película de ciencia ficción sobre hormigas gigantes del espacio, Tommy y Carlos quedan asustados. / Inspirados por una película de ciencia ficción, los Rugrats deciden usar un "rayo vago" para convertirse en miniaturas.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi conoce al famoso cuidador de niños, el Dr. Lipschitz, y lo invita a cenar a su casa. / Los Rugrats fantasean en cómo sería ser adultos y deciden que es mejor ser bebés.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Las familias escapan a las montañas para pasar Navidad. Las vacaciones se tornan peligrosas cuando Tommy y Carlitos ponen trampas para Santa por toda la cabaña y el papá de Carlitos se viste como Santa y trata de bajar por la chimenea.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de escuchar una historia del Abuelo, Tommy sueña con que los extraterrestres lo llevan adentro de una nave espacial. / Cuando el Abuelo pierde a Tommy, decide usar sus técnicas de investigador de los años 30’s para encontrarlo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando un juego de escondidas se pone extraño, Carlitos pierde sus lentes y el mundo le parece como una pesadilla borrosa. / Un zorrillo moja a Carlitos y él se pone más triste que nunca.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando a Tommy le sacan su osito preferido, decide tomar el consejo de Angélica y empieza a portarse mal. / Angélica recibe un juego de magia como regalo. Ella y los Rugrats se sorprenden cuando Angélica hace desaparecer a Lili.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Una nueva familia se muda en frente de la casa de Tommy y él inmediatamente se hace amigo de su nueva vecina de tres años, Susie. / Hugo le compra a Tommy un juego para armar, pero los bebés se entretienen más con la caja del juguete.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de que Angélica les cuenta una historia de terror, Tommy y Carlitos comienzan a tener miedo de irse por el desagüe de la bañera. / Cuando el hermano de Didi se casa, Tommy y Carlitos se obsesionan con el pastel.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y Carlitos pierden sin querer a Cynthia, la muñeca favorita de Angélica y tienen que decidir si contárselo o no a Angélica. / Carlitos tiene un amigo imaginario que se llama Barney, que nadie puede ver o escuchar, solamente Carlos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats piensan que un camión de basura que pasa todas las semanas es un monstruo que se llama Hubert. / Los Rugrats ven un programa de televisión sobre un perro que habla, y se convencen de que Firulais los está rechazando.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de una experiencia traumática, Carlitos comienza a temerle a los toboganes. Tommy, Susie, Fili y Lili lo ayudan a superar su miedo. / Los Rugrats van a una piscina pública y la confunden con un inodoro gigante.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras el Abuelo compite en un campeonato de bolos, los Rugrats se van a explorar y descubren que el contrincante del Abuelo está haciendo trampa. / Angélica es castigada por Julio, así que decide dejar su casa e irse a la de Tommy.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi concursa en un juego peligroso de televisión en donde tiene que enfrentar sus propios miedos. / Boris y Minka cuidan a Tommy y Angélica por un fin de semana, pero no se acuerdan bien de sus técnicas de cuidar a niños.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Angélica salva a Carlitos de ser atropellado por un niño en triciclo, ella decide que Carlitos debe ser su esclavo para siempre. / Los bebés admiran a Susie porque ella siempre los defiende de Angélica.

programme.title: ONE Fight Night
programme.desc: Two unbeaten champions collide in a high-stakes battle for light heavyweight supremacy.

programme.title: ONE Fight Night
programme.desc: Tensions boil over in this explosive rematch for bantamweight gold between two of ONE's fiercest finishers.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A dragon regains his boyish form, a noble warrior once feared dead makes a shocking resurrection, and bitter enemies set aside their differences to enjoy a well-deserved feast!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The weary marines and the rescued children get teary-eyed as they say goodbye to the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Law enters into treacherous negotiations with Joker!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On their way after having set out from Punk Hazard, the Straw Hats find out their next destination - just as a huge wave comes crashing down on the Sunny! But it's rough sailing for the G-5 as well, as Donflamingo arrives on the scene and wreaks havoc!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Aokiji's intercession saves Smoker and sends Joker off to rethink his strategy, leaving unanswered questions about Aokiji's current status. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats catch their breath as the Sunny makes its way through the rough seas of the New World.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Smooth seas stretch out before the Straw Hats as they leave Punk Hazard far behind -- but while they fear Donflamingo's return and prepare to face him, another foe lies in wait, whose powers could be their downfall!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Breed has Luffy, Trafalgar, and Chopper firmly in his grasp with his Peto-Peto power! Breed dreams of a world in which he has enslaved all the humans, but Luffy's stubborn persistence and unwillingness to cooperate may have landed him in hot water.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dressrosa! Luffy and the Straw Hats divide into teams and set about their business on this passionate, enchanting island! But here, in the heart of enemy territory, danger lurks around every corner. Luffy and the others encounter a mysterious blind man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy enters the Corrida Colosseum in order to compete for Ace's Flare-Flare Fruit! But with the mightiest warriors of the New World assembled and standing in his way, the competition will not be easy. The first stage of the competition is a battle royal.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the deadly battle of Block A winds down, all the onlookers in the stadium are shocked to discover the secret identity of the winner! Meanwhile, Luffy's cover may be blown as another voice from the past returns.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy meets an unexpected acquaintance from the past, Bellamy, who seems to be up to no good! Meanwhile, Caesar Handover Team encounters a snag when they learn just how dangerous Green Bit is!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle heats up and the widely despised Bartolomeo takes the ring! But he'll have to contend with both the Prodence Kingdom contingent, and Dressrosa's own local favorite, Bellamy! From up above, Luffy risks having his cover blown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chinjao continues to provoke Luffy, hoping to gain revenge against the grandson of his sworn enemy, Garp! But as the argument continues, Luffy risks having his cover blown, and his identity revealed! Meanwhile, the battle in Block B rages.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Franky try to regroup after Doflamingo's betrayal, hoping that destroying the factory is not yet out of their grasp. Meanwhile Luffy makes a friend in the Colosseum and Usopp ends up thrust into an uncomfortable position!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Sunny is mysteriously deformed by the bizarre powers of Giolla! Can Nami, Chopper, and Brook act in time to save their beloved home? Meanwhile, the battle for Block C continues as Luffy suffers a staggering setback.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After knocking down the Giant, Hajrudin, as payback for what he did to Ucy, Luffy has to deal with Ideo, whose punch has the destructive force of a bomb, while the Funk Brothers show off their bizarre fighting technique.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Chopper, and Brooke keep trying to evade Jora and win back the Sunny even though it's been turned into a piece of art! In the Colosseum, Don Chin Jao finally faces Luffy - whose power will prove greater?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands along against Don Chinjao, and learns about the old grudge he bears against Garp! Meanwhile, Usopp and Robin get swept up in the Tontatta Kingdom's raid against the royal family, and Franky learns the eerie secret of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontatta Kingdom gears up for its all-out assault on the Doflamingo Family, as Usopp and Robin are caught up in the war effort! Meanwhile, Franky arrives the headquarters of the toy movement where he finds Zoro, Nami & the others are cornered by Jora.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao's hatred of Garp and Luffy is finally explained, while his battle against Luffy comes to an end. With tremendous power, one of them is squarely eliminated! But is that really the end of the Colosseum battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the battle with Don Chinjao long behind him, Luffy advances to the final round! Block-D contender Cavendish, however, takes the chance and pounces on Luffy, who is defended by an unlikely ally! The agenda of Colosseum gladiator Rebecca is exposed.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: While caught in a battle between two Nietzschean prides, the crew captures a hostile who claims that his pride possesses a map of the slipstream.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew seeks a lost colony of Nietzscheans and discovers another crew that has been secretly helping them.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew installs a new AI in a new Commonwealth battleship, and naturally, things don't go as they should.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
